testsuite.name: APITests.dataaccess.SoapTest
testsuite.system-out: Status: 200 Body: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <m:NumberToWordsResponse xmlns:m="http://www.dataaccess.com/webservicesserver/"> <m:NumberToWordsResult>five hundred </m:NumberToWordsResult> </m:NumberToWordsResponse> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope> Status: 200 Body: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"> <soap:Body> <m:NumberToWordsResponse xmlns:m="http://www.dataaccess.com/webservicesserver/"> <m:NumberToWordsResult>five hundred </m:NumberToWordsResult> </m:NumberToWordsResponse> </soap:Body> </soap:Envelope>
